Description:
Island Views, Loft & Studio, Native Beauty

Welcome to the place you can’t wait to call home, an idyllic ocean-view escape with abundant native flora and glorious views that truly set it apart.

Set on approximately two acres in Takou Bay, this north-facing botanic haven enjoys a frost-free coastal microclimate just 24 minutes from bustling Kerikeri township.

With two acres of private, peaceful space, you can wander through flourishing gardens, across sprawling lawns, and into the kanuka shrubland where tui, fantail, grey warblers, silvereyes and baby brown quail are regular visitors. The north-facing island-view aspect invites warm winter sunshine into the home while capturing picturesque views to the Cavalli Islands. A freestanding, custom-built studio tucked in the leafy garden is perfect for art, hobbies or work-from-home use.

Designed for maximum connection with the natural environment, the home offers warmth, natural light and personality, while capturing inspiring views from the huge timber deck, generous open plan living, and romantic master bedroom. Sliding glass doors in every main room create effortless indoor-outdoor flow, while the renovated kitchen is ready to impress.

The expansive master bedroom enjoys calming views and includes a walk-in robe and ensuite. The second bedroom has a private balcony and built-in robe, while the third bedroom or office also includes a built-in robe.

Above the double garage and storage shed is a large loft space ideal for storage, creative use, a home office, guest accommodation, teen retreat or generous fourth bedroom.

Features include a bespoke modern kitchen, wood burner, claw-foot bath, polished timber floors, sarked timber ceilings, spacious decking, fresh paint, quality window furnishings, a 2020 Colorsteel roof, artist’s studio, and a subtropical orchard with 14 fruit varieties.

A beautiful nature retreat, retirement haven, or the perfect base for a creative home business, this is a property well worth seeing.

PREMIUM LIFESTYLE LOTS – COUNTRYSIDE LIVING

An exceptional opportunity presents to secure an outstanding lifestyle lot in a tightly held and highly sought after Franklin location. Elevated positions throughout capture expansive outlooks and breathtaking sunsets. Covenants have cultivated an area of high quality homes and preserved bushland, ensuring a rural atmosphere while maintaining the prestige and long-term value in this elite lifestyle location.

Zoned Rural – Countryside Living, four individual lots are available, ranging in size. Lot 11 spans 3.85 hectares, Lot 10 offers 3.32 hectares, Lot 9 comprises 1.89 hectares and Lot 8 measures 1.67 hectares. Each lot offers a mix of gentle contours, complemented by mature trees, native bush and abundant birdlife, creating a peaceful and private rural environment.

Excellently positioned in a rapidly growing location between Drury and Pukekohe, everyday convenience is close at hand. Pukekohe township and its amenities are just 6km away, with easy access to the southern motorway via the Drury on-ramp approximately 8km away. The future Drury Metropolitan Centre is planned as a vibrant community complemented by the Drury South Crossing Business Hub. With major infrastructure projects and large-scale developments already in progress, this property is ideally positioned to benefit from Drury’s emergence as a key urban centre.

School bus routes are nearby, with zoning for Pukekohe High School and Pukekohe Intermediate, along with the highly regarded Pukekohe East Primary School. The recently electrified KiwiRail line now provides a direct connection from Pukekohe through to Auckland City, offering excellent accessibility for commuters and access to leading private schools. Local transport options are also available to ACG Strathallan, located approximately 15.5km away.

Infrastructure is already in place, including concrete driveway access, power and fibre optic connections, allowing future development to proceed with ease. Each lot offers the freedom and space to create your own rural retreat. Lifestyle sections of this quality, size and location are increasingly rare. Enquire today to secure your preferred lot in this outstanding Franklin countryside setting.

Open home for 29 Otau Mountain Road, Clevedon. Starting at 02:00PM and finishing at 02:30PM 

Open home for listing ID:930799. Listing by Suzy Causebrook from Barfoot & Thompson.

A Rare Opportunity in Warkworth

Forget the previous price tags – the vendor is ready to move on.

This 11 acre parcel of prime land, located adjacent to a rapidly growing residential subdivision, presents an outstanding development opportunity. The property sits within the Warkworth South Development area known as Waimanawa, a strategic gateway location between Warkworth and Auckland in one of the region’s fastest growing corridors.

The land is already zoned Residential Large Lot, with an approximate section size of 4,000m². Savvy investors and developers may recognise the potential to add significant value by collaborating with neighbouring landowners to establish the necessary infrastructure and further subdivide the land into a small scale residential development.

With the completion of the Warkworth motorway extension, travel times to Auckland have significantly improved, with off peak journeys now taking around 45 minutes.

Conveniently located just a 3 minute drive from Warkworth town centre, the property is ideally positioned for future residential neighbourhoods.

For more information, please contact me.
